title: Lakulīśa Pāśupata Sādhana
century: Classical (c. 2nd c. CE — Lakulīśa); Sūtras and Bhāṣya c. 4th–5th c. CE
description: The Pāśupata Śaiva tradition attributed to Lakulīśa (c. 2nd c. CE) — the ascetic-only Śaiva path of the *atimārga*, outside the householder Mantramārga. Attested in the *Pāśupata Sūtras* with the *Pañcārthabhāṣya* of Kauṇḍinya (c. 4th–5th c. CE), and complemented by the *Gaṇakārikā*, the *Ratnaṭīkā*, and the *Mṛgendra Āgama*.
